target_paper.title: The complete conformational free energy landscape of beta-xylose reveals a two-fold catalytic itinerary for beta-xylanases

checks.name: deltaF_C7ax_C7eq
checks.source: fes_phi.dat (1D phi projection, Boltzmann-integrated over psi)
checks.errata: 2D grid minimum gives 4.78 kJ/mol; both values are in raw data. 1D projection is the correct literature comparison.

checks.name: convergence
checks.errata: Last stride pair (fes_9→fes_10) drift is 0.00 kJ/mol. Claimed 0.5 likely from earlier stride pair. Simulation is better converged than reported.

checks.name: chair_basins_found
checks.errata: Global minimum is at theta=172deg (1C4), not theta=8deg (4C1). For beta-D-xylopyranose 4C1 is the expected ground state. Likely atom-ordering convention issue — requires confirmation of Cremer-Pople ring atom ordering (C1-C2-C3-C4-C5-O5) before interpreting chair labels.

checks.name: convergence
checks.errata: Last stride pair (fes_4→fes_5) drift is 0.00 kJ/mol. Claimed 2.9 likely from earlier stride pair. Simulation is better converged than reported.

modules.name: enzyme-bound-puckering

checks.name: system_setup
checks.note: PDB 2D24 chain A + -1 subsite xylose (res C4), CHARMM36, 92745 atoms

checks.name: npt_equilibration
checks.note: 100 ps at 300 K / 1 bar, density stable

checks.name: production_metadynamics
checks.note: 10 ns WTMetaD on Cremer-Pople theta, running on RTX 3090

modules.system: GH10 xylanase chain A (427 residues) + -1 subsite BXYL + 28758 TIP3P + 88 NA + 86 CL

tiers.label: GROMACS industry control
tiers.proves: Pipeline correctness, CV selection, expected FEL topology

tiers.label: NUCLEUS IPC-composed
tiers.proves: Composable primal stack produces identical FELs

evolution.acceptance_test: Free vs enzyme-bound puckering FEL reproduces conformational selection observed in Iglesias-Fernandez 2015

audit.method: Every claim traced to raw GROMACS/PLUMED output files with shell one-liners for independent verification

findings.summary: deltaF 5.57 kJ/mol is from 1D phi projection; 2D grid minimum is 4.78 kJ/mol. Both valid, methodology was unspecified.
Claimed drifts (0.5, 2.9 kJ/mol) from earlier stride pairs; actual final drift is 0.00 in both. Better converged than reported.
Global minimum at theta=172deg (1C4) instead of expected 4C1. Possibly atom-ordering convention swapping chair labels. Requires domain expert confirmation.
findings.action: errata added to chair_basins_found; question raised in ABG_HANDOFF.md for Alistaire

findings.summary: All 6 PLUMED ring atom indices verified against .gro file. Bond distances 1.43-1.60 Angstrom, chemically reasonable.

audit.conclusion: 2 low-severity reporting imprecisions, 1 medium-severity convention question. No physics errors. The AI wrote configs, ran commands, checked numbers against files. The physics came from GROMACS 2026.0 + PLUMED 2.9.2 on real hardware.

next_steps: Complete Module 3 production metadynamics (~90 min remaining)
Run sum_hills and analyze enzyme-bound puckering FEL
Compare free vs enzyme-bound: conformational selection at -1 subsite
2D FEL on Cremer-Pople (qx, qy) for full Stoddart diagram
Begin Tier 1: Python reference force evaluation for xylose system
Evolve lithoSpore chassis from LTEE-specific to domain-agnostic
